title: Minimum start voltage
summary: The unit requires a minimum start voltage of 85% of the rated voltage.
evidence_quote: 机组最低启动电压须保持额定电压之85%以上

title: Operating voltage range
summary: During operation, voltage must be within ±10% of rated voltage, with phase imbalance within ±2%.
evidence_quote: 运转中须在额定电压的±10%范围内，各相之间的电压差应在±2%范围内

title: Rated voltage
summary: Standard unit rated operating voltage is 380V/3N~/50Hz.
evidence_quote: 标准机组额定工作电压为380V/3N~/50Hz

title: Water quality pH range
summary: Water pH must be between 7.5 and 9.0 to avoid corrosion and blockage.
evidence_quote: 要求水系统内水的 PH值在 7.5～9.0之间

title: Water calcium and magnesium ion limit
summary: Calcium and magnesium ion content must be below 150 mg/L.
evidence_quote: 水系统内水中钙镁离子含量需要低于 150mg/L

title: Water chloride ion limit
summary: Chloride ion content should be below 300 mg/L (recommended).
evidence_quote: 氯离子含量需要低于 300mg/L(推荐)

title: Minimum water volume calculation
summary: System minimum water volume V = Ts * 14.17 / TD * (H1 - H2 + TD * H2) with Ts=10, TD=2, H1=33 for TCA201 or 50 for TCA301.

title: Compressor start limit
summary: Compressor starts must not exceed 6 times per hour.
evidence_quote: 压缩机一个小时启动不能超过 6次

title: Minimum water flow requirement
summary: Water flow must never be less than the nameplate required value whenever the unit is running.
evidence_quote: 机组的水流量要求在无论何时，只要机组运行的情况下都不得小于铭牌标定的要求值

title: Module water temperature difference
summary: Typical water temperature difference across a single module is 5°C.
evidence_quote: 一般单个模块的进出水温差为 5℃

title: Expansion tank volume factor
summary: Expansion tank volume V = (0.03~0.034) * Vc, where Vc is system water capacity.
evidence_quote: 膨胀水箱容积V=(0.03∽ 0.034)Vc

title: Pipe pressure test requirement
summary: Test pressure must be >1.25 times working pressure, not less than 0.6 MPa, hold 5 min, pressure drop ≤0.02 MPa.
evidence_quote: 管道试压的试压压力要大于工作压力 1.25倍，但不得小于 0.6Mpa，保压5分钟，压降不大于0.02Mpa

title: Water filter mesh requirement
summary: Water filter must be ≥20 mesh.
evidence_quote: 水过滤器：其作用是过滤水系统内的杂质，防止损坏水侧换热器，≥20 目

title: Minimum clearance around unit
summary: Unit must maintain at least 1.8 m distance from surrounding objects for ventilation and maintenance.
evidence_quote: 机组应与周围物体保持1.8米以上距离

title: Distance between multiple units
summary: Multiple units placed side by side should maintain a distance of more than 3.0 m.
evidence_quote: 多台机组并排放置，应保持3.0米以上距离

title: Minimum distance from residential area
summary: Avoid installing within 10 m of residential areas to prevent noise disturbance.
evidence_quote: 请尽量避免在居民区 10米内安装

title: Main pipe diameter recommendations
summary: Main water pipe diameter: ≤80 tons ≥DN80, 80~160 tons ≥DN125, 160~240 ≥DN150, 240~360 ≥DN200.

title: Module water connection size
summary: Each module water inlet/outlet pipe diameter is DN50 with internal thread connection.
evidence_quote: 机组每个模块进出水管径都是 DN50，接口形式为内螺纹连接

title: Water pipe diameter vs capacity
summary: Pipe diameter selection: 50 kW → DN50, 120 kW → DN80, 230 kW → DN100, 350 kW → DN125, 465 kW → DN150, 580 kW → DN170, 700 kW → DN200.

title: Ideal water velocity in pipes
summary: Ideal water velocity: pump outlet 2.4~3.6 m/s, pump inlet 1.2~2.1 m/s, main pipe 1.2~4.5 m/s, riser 0.9~3.0 m/s, branch 1.5~2.1 m/s.

title: Maximum water velocity by annual operating hours
summary: Maximum water velocity: 1500 h → 4.6 m/s, 2000 h → 4.3 m/s, 3000 h → 4.0 m/s, 4000 h → 3.7 m/s, 5000 h → 3.0 m/s.

title: Pipe support spacing
summary: Support spacing: <DN25 → 2.0 m, DN25~DN32 → 2.5 m, DN40~DN50 → 3.0 m, DN70~DN80 → 4.0 m.
evidence_quote:
管径mm <DN25 DN25∽ DN32 DN40∽ DN50 DN70∽ DN80
间距m 2.0 2.5 3.0 4.0

title: Condensate pipe slope
summary: Condensate pipe must maintain a slope of 0.5% to 1%.
evidence_quote: 在排列凝结水管时要保持0.5％∽1％的坡度

title: Water pipe slope
summary: Water pipes must maintain a slope of 1/1000 to 3/1000 towards the riser.
evidence_quote: 管路不论采用什么排列方式，但均要保持 1/1000∽ 3/1000坡度

title: Minimum static pressure at return
summary: Static pressure at unit return must be above 5.0 mH2O.
evidence_quote: 检查机组回水处的静压是否正常 （5.0mH2O以上）

title: Compressor preheat time
summary: Compressor must be preheated for 24 hours before trial run.
evidence_quote: 试运转前，压缩机须预热 24小时

title: Minimum ambient temperature for standard cooling
summary: Standard unit cannot operate in cooling mode when ambient temperature is below 16°C.
evidence_quote: 标准机组在环境温度低于 16℃时不可以制冷运行

title: Foundation load capacity
summary: Foundation must withstand a load of not less than 500 kg/m².
evidence_quote: 基础为钢筋混凝土结构或槽钢架，可承受重压不小于 500kg/m²以上

title: Vibration pad thickness
summary: Rubber vibration pads between unit base and foundation must be at least 20 mm thick.
evidence_quote: 机组底座与地基之间增加橡胶减振垫或减振器，厚度不小于 20mm

title: Anchor bolt size
summary: Use M10 bolts to fix the unit to the foundation.
evidence_quote: 机组与地基之间采用 M10的螺栓固定

title: Expansion tank height requirement
summary: Expansion tank must be installed about 3 m above the highest point of the water system.
evidence_quote: 高度必须高于系统内的水管路最高处3米左右

title: Flow switch straight pipe requirement
summary: Flow switch must be installed on a straight pipe section with length >5 times pipe diameter before and after.
evidence_quote: 直管段长度前后必须大于 5倍管径

title: Maximum two-way valve installation ratio
summary: If two-way valves are installed without bypass, the number must not exceed 50% of total terminals.
evidence_quote: 末端安装二通阀而又没有安装联动旁通阀时，要求二通阀的安装数量不能超过总末端数量的 50%

title: Pump installation pressure threshold
summary: If pump outlet pressure exceeds 0.8 MPa, install pump on the outlet header to avoid damage.
evidence_quote: 当水泵出口压力大于0.8MPa时，为避免大压力对机组损坏，此时建议装在出水总管上

title: Auxiliary heater minimum specific power
summary: Auxiliary heater specification must not be less than 0.2 kW per kW of heating capacity.
evidence_quote: 选配辅助加热器时，规格不可小于 0.2KW/KW

title: Auxiliary heater ambient temperature threshold
summary: It is recommended to configure auxiliary heater when outdoor temperature ≤2°C.
evidence_quote: 建议室外气温≤2 ℃时，都须配置辅助加热器

title: Rated current for TCA201
summary: Total rated current for TCA201 is 45 A.

title: Rated current for TCA301
summary: Total rated current for TCA301 is 65 A.

title: Main power cable size for TCA201
summary: Main power cable size for TCA201 is 16 mm².

title: Main power cable size for TCA301
summary: Main power cable size for TCA301 is 20 mm².
